metaData.Key Information: Dr. Schar Gluten Free Wraps! Fill, fold and roll all your favorite ingredients tin one gluten free wrap! Warm the wrap for 1.5min in a pre heated non stick pan, turning regurarly. In a microwave oven, remove the package, and microwave (800W) the wrap on full power for 20-30 seconds. A gluten free, wheat free and lactose free product that does not compromise on taste.ise on taste.<<<<
metaData.Preparation: Dr. Schar Gluten Free Wraps! Fill, fold and roll all your favorite ingredients tin one gluten free wrap! Warm the wrap for 1.5min in a pre heated non stick pan, turning regurarly. In a microwave oven, remove the package, and microwave (800W) the wrap on full power for 20-30 seconds. A gluten free, wheat free and lactose free product that does not compromise on taste.ise on taste.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a dry and cool place. Once opened refrigerate and consume within 3 days
